description: hpayushboard.org is the public website for the Himachal Pradesh State Medical Council of Indian System of Medicine / Board of Ayurvedic and Unani Systems of Medicine. It provides information about the board, registrations, fees, notices, and links to its user-facing registration portal.
summary: hpayushboard.org itself exposes no documented developer integration surfaces; the website is a public informational portal with a separate end-user registration/login link on a subdomain and third-party references to an API hosted under apisetu.gov.in, not hpayushboard.org.
